rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016, Line 1. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication is continued to April 1, 2016. CCP 170.6 on file. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint In Case No. Cgc-15-549025
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016, Line 2. PLAINTIFF ZHOU RONG, JUN-YI ZHAO, MING ZHAO Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint In Case No. CGC-15-549025 is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005; CCP 1013; CCP 1010.6. Also, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUE WILLIAMS VS. HSINHONG YEH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016, Line 5. DEFENDANT HSINHONG YEH, TAMMIE YEH Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations re: fraud and conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights and safety. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CORAL PARTNERS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL VS. SANJAY L PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016, Line 6. PLAINTIFF CORAL PARTNERS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY, ZAGAR/EDDYST., LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively For Summary Adjudication Of Issues is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden in showing breaches of the lease re: insurance; assignment and encumbrance of leasehold interest. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment on any one of the breaches. Defendant failed to show by admissible competent evidence a triable issue of fact. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BHARAT PATEL DBA EARLE HOTEL & K. MIRANDA, PROP. VS. RICHARD PAUL ROSS HOWLAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, March 25, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT RICHARD HOWLAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment Hearing Required to address statutory basis for the motion listed in Notice of Motion vs. Points and Authorities. =(501/REQ)
